RAPIDLY FLOWING WATER REPORTED ACROSS MITCHELL STREET IN DOWNTOWN CADILLAC. WATER WAS DEEP ENOUGH TO BEGIN ENTERING THE ENTERANCES OF BUSINESSES. NEARBY INTERSECTIONS FLOODED WITH 1 TO 2 FEET OF WATER. SPOTTER ALSO REPORTED 4.00 IN OF RAIN ENDING AT 11 AM.
